pitfalls: 相鄰數值易被 OCR 合併成一個 token（如174+193→174193）→ 用行級 ROI 分區裁切消除
固定座標 ROI 對部分卡不適用（版型微差/直橫式）→ 用寬裕行級裁切+標籤錨點解析更魯棒
星等讀取不穩定 → 以官方 PDF 為最終裁判，不用 VLM 讀圖
正面圖雜訊多（藝術圖干擾）→ 六維只從背圖讀取
R系列精選卡匣是SPECIAL非1★ → stars:0 category:special

splitHeuristics.action: split at midpoint, validate each part in stat range [20-260]

splitHeuristics.condition: row OCR returns < expected numeric values
splitHeuristics.action: try digit-level split of allDigits string into equal chunks
fallback to full-image OCR for that stat

roiTemplate.methodology: 4-row ROIs (not 6 per-value), each row cropped generously then parsed with label anchoring

rows.label: row_hp
rows.note: 頂部條帶含 HP 標籤+值。注意：~21 張卡此區域可能不含完整數值（版型偏移），需 fallback

rows.label: row_atk_def
rows.note: 第二列：攻擊|防禦 並排，95.7% 準確

rows.label: row_spa_spd
rows.note: 第三列：特攻|特防 並排，97.1% 準確

rows.label: row_speed
rows.note: 底部速度條帶。偶有合併（1107→110/07），需 split heuristic

roiTemplate.layoutDescription: 右側 2×2 網格 + 頂底單列 = 4 行 ROI

learnedCorrections.issue: HP row ROI does not capture numeric value (only label text)
learnedCorrections.likelyCause: layout offset or portrait orientation variant for these cards
learnedCorrections.resolution: PENDING: add full-image fallback for null HP stats

learnedCorrections.issue: Speed value merge with adjacent digit (e.g., 1197, 1107, 1113)
learnedCorrections.fix: split heuristic: if token >3 digits, try all splits keeping both parts in [20,260]
